highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.0.0 is the first stable v3, built on Skia m116 with .NET 8 support and obsolete APIs removed.
highlights_body: The line modernises the whole stack: LibraryImport-based P/Invokes, refreshed native dependencies (HarfBuzz, libjpeg-turbo, libwebp), new accelerated views on WinUI and WPF, Metal on Mac Catalyst, and dozens of MAUI/Uno/Blazor fixes.

breaking.title: All v2 [Obsolete] members removed
breaking.body: Everything marked [Obsolete] during the v2 line — including the legacy SKPaint text/font members — is gone. Move text to SKFont, use the modern sampling and encoder overloads, and re-generate against the 3.0 APIs.

breaking.title: .NET Framework and workload targets modernised
breaking.body: The libraries now target .NET 8 and its MAUI/Uno/WinUI workloads. Projects still on older TFMs may need to update SDKs, workloads or PackageReferences to consume the new packages.

breaking.title: Metal is the default backend on Mac Catalyst
breaking.body: SkiaSharp.Views on Mac Catalyst now renders through Metal instead of the deprecated GL path. Custom hosts that assumed GL should switch to the Metal APIs or the shared SKCanvasView.

bullets.detail: The bundled engine is Chrome/Skia m116, bringing years of upstream rendering, text and codec fixes into a stable release.
HarfBuzz moved to 8.3.0, libjpeg-turbo to 3.0.0 (then rolled to 2.1.5.1 for stability), libwebp to 1.3.2, plus the usual codec and font engine bumps.

bullets.lead: SKBlender, extended color filters and picture APIs
bullets.detail: Exposes SKBlender, adds the missing color-filter constructors, more SKPicture entry points and an R-Tree overload of BeginRecording for faster hit-testing.
SetRectRadii, color filters and GetPixelSpan with offsets now accept Span<T>, so callers can avoid array allocations in tight rendering loops.

bullets.lead: Skottie animation builder and raw shaders
bullets.detail: Binds Skottie's Animation Builder and adds SKImage.ToRawShader for advanced compositing scenarios.
Adds the Metal GRBackendRenderTarget APIs on every Apple platform and unifies GRMtlTextureInfo with readonly getters.

bullets.lead: Cloned SKPaint no longer crashes on dispose
bullets.detail: Fixes an AccessViolationException when disposing a paint cloned from another paint.
Snapshot on the Metal backend no longer returns a magenta image on Apple platforms.
SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions now matches the 2.88.8 behaviour that had regressed during the m11x work.

bullets.lead: MAUI, WinUI and Uno view fixes
bullets.detail: Fixes memory leaks in MAUI views, WinUI XamlRoot handling, Uno canvas context activation, and background stretching in SKXamlCanvas.

bullets.lead: New accelerated views for WinUI and WPF
bullets.detail: Adds SKSwapChainPanel-backed WinUI views and a real SKGLElement for WPF, plus the SKGLView for MAUI on Windows.
Mac Catalyst renders with Metal by default, and iOS/tvOS/macOS all share the Metal backend APIs.
The P/Invoke layer moves to LibraryImport and function pointers for AOT-friendly, trim-safe interop, and PlatformConfiguration is trimmable.

contributor_summaries.jeromelaban: A run of Uno and Blazor fixes — canvas context activation, XamlRoot handling, WASM fallback safety and the nosimd build restoration
contributor_summaries.maxkatz6: Modernised the interop layer with function pointers and LibraryImport, unified the Metal TFM and made PlatformConfiguration trimmable
contributor_summaries.Youssef1313: Uno Skia BGRA8888 fix, the SetRectRadii Span overload and the SKFilterQuality compatibility overloads
contributor_summaries.beto-rodriguez: Exposed the DPI properties on the Blazor components
contributor_summaries.gmurray81: Added the SKGLElement control to SkiaSharp.Views.WPF
contributor_summaries.jeremy-visionaid: Fixed the AccessViolationException when disposing a cloned SKPaint
contributor_summaries.lindexi: Removed the async void pattern from SKXamlCanvas
contributor_summaries.sungaila: Restored SKBitmap.Encode with SKPngEncoderOptions to its 2.88.8 behaviour
contributor_summaries.taublast: Fixed the magenta snapshot on the Apple Metal backend

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 modernised the repository, brought the .NET 8 target family online and started deleting the v2 [Obsolete] surface.
preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 landed the codec dependency refresh (libjpeg-turbo, libwebp, HarfBuzz).
preview_summaries.p3: Preview 3 focused on APIs — SKBlender, more SKPicture entry points and the R-Tree overload.
preview_summaries.p4: Preview 4 landed the accelerated WinUI and WPF views, more Skottie bindings and a raft of MAUI/Uno fixes.
preview_summaries.p5: Preview 5 rebased on Skia m116, cut the remaining v2 shims and moved to LibraryImport.

harfbuzz_summary: HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0 lands as part of the stable v3 line, tracking the HarfBuzz 8.3.0 upstream and getting the same LibraryImport/interop modernisation as SkiaSharp.
